header.title: Jinalaya Protection (Repair)
header.subtitle: Work for resolving leakage and other issues in Jinalayas

whatIsThis.text: If the protection of a Jinalaya — the pride of Jinshasan — is at risk and there is no other solution, then as an exception, even great saints who never touch vegetation may uproot plants:
whatIsThis.highlight: If scriptures state this, then how mandatory is this duty for us Shravaks?

solution.title: Solution
solution.p1: We know that the use of cement puts the safety of the Jinalaya at risk! By identifying the root cause of leakage and temporarily resolving it using cement slurry, Adhyatma Parivar is providing a solution.
solution.p2: In the future, this solution will be carried out through extensive use of lime.
solution.highlight: In many Jinalayas across Ahmedabad, Mumbai, Kolhapur and several other places, leakage problems have been resolved through protection work done by Adhyatma Parivar.

results.title: Results
results.conclusion: The images themselves say everything; nothing more needs to be written!

abuDelwada.title: A Landmark of Fortune - Abu Delwada
abuDelwada.subTitle: Abu - Delwada Derasar...
abuDelwada.p1: For eight centuries, not only India but the entire world has admired these temples of Abu Delwada that leave thousands, lakhs, and crores of people awestruck. How can their glory be described in words?
cards: Due to large cracks throughout the Jinalaya, the leakage problem was so severe that 20 buckets of water would collect inside!
Water entering through cracks was hollowing the internal stone, causing the entire Jinalaya to deteriorate.
Adhyatma Parivar removed the 2 to 2.5 inch cement layer that caused the cracks and repaired it with lime, preventing further deterioration.
By giving us the opportunity to perform this great work, Seth Shri Kalyanji Permanandji Pedhi, Sirohi, brought immense joy to Adhyatma Parivar.

incident.title: A Thrilling Incident
incident.startDesc: There is a saying: 'A good task faces a hundred obstacles.'
incident.p1: Someone complained to the ASI Jodhpur Department: 'Historical carvings of Abu Delwada are being tampered with.' News arrived from Jodhpur to the Sirohi Trust that 'Senior officers are coming tomorrow for inspection.'
incident.p2: Coincidentally, the manager of Adhyatma Parivar was nearby. He arrived immediately. ASI officer Imran Ali was given a complete inspection of the work jointly by the Trust President and Adhyatma Parivar representatives.
incident.officerQuote: At the end of the inspection, the officer remarked:
incident.officerStatement: 'Even ASI does not take such precautions for protecting ancient heritage!'
incident.conclusion: Hearing this, everyone's heart overflowed with joy.

vimalvasahi.title: Repair of Vimalvasahi
vimalvasahi.p1: This is the Rang Mandap of 'Vimalvasahi', where heavy water leakage occurred due to cracks!
vimalvasahi.p2: The difference between the repaired section using lime and the unrepaired section is clearly visible.

ranakpur.title: A Landmark of Fortune - Ranakpur
ranakpur.intro1: By granting us the opportunity to protect this great pilgrimage site nestled in the hills and renowned like Everest, Seth Anandji Kalyanji Pedhi elevated our fortune.
ranakpur.intro2: And thus began a remarkable protection campaign! The captivating images themselves are enough to understand the magnitude of the work.

cards.title: Fungus
cards.desc: The blackness visible on the spires is actually fungus, which is causing cracks. Repairs were required every two years.

cards.title: Fungus Removal and Restoration
cards.desc: With ASI's cooperation, fungus is first removed using soft chemicals. Then cracks and damaged portions are restored using lime, followed by a water-repellent process.

cards.title: Long-Term Result
cards.desc: This result will now last at least 10-15 years.

cta.heading: Cracks or Leakage in Jinalaya?
cta.content: If there is any Jinalaya near you facing cracks or leakage, we will help make it safe and strong.

stats.label: Total Dev Bagicha constructed by Shrisangh and Individuals

quotes.main: Shri Jinraj seated in the garden of blooming flowers
quotes.desc: This line becomes partially meaningful only a few times a year during grand Mahapuja when flowers are brought from outside. Personal flower worship has become 99.99% dependent on the florist. Whatever flowers she brings are the ones available for offering. Is there no solution to this?
quotes.highlight: Can this couplet recited daily not become a reality?
quotes.continuation: In the fifth dream, the Lord’s mother saw many varieties of flowers. Can we not perform flower worship with as many varieties as possible? The answer to all these questions is 'Yes'.

showcase.title: Presented by Adhyatma Parivar: Dev Bagicha and Home Flower Beds

items.title: The family manages the flower beds.
Beginning of Dev Bagicha in Khambhat

problem.title: A Landmark of Fortune: Protection of the Sacred Rayan Tree
problem.desc1: May 2021 was a difficult time when Cyclone 'Tauktae' caused destruction everywhere. Hundreds of trees were damaged at Giriraj and Siddhavad. But when the main branch of the glorious tree under which Dada Adinath had arrived 99 times broke, devotees were stunned.
problem.desc2: Adhyatma Parivar was contacted by Seth A.K. Pedhi. Along with a consultant, the team immediately reached Palitana. The chief representative of the Pedhi also reached Giriraj.
problem.quote: "You are worried about the broken branch, but the entire tree is in serious condition. It will not last long. The whole tree is diseased."
problem.desc3: Hearing the consultant’s words after examining the Rayan tree filled everyone present with fear and concern. What will happen now? What is the solution?

solution.title: Immediate Measures Taken as Per Consultant’s Guidance
steps: The marble flooring around the tree was removed and soil from other Rayan trees was added.
The quantity of irrigation and related measures were determined.
solution.result: Within fifteen days, a miracle began to unfold through the faith of lakhs of people, and within a month the vision of 'Neeludi Rayan Tree Beneath' was restored!
solution.galleryTitle: A Glimpse of the Work Done at War Level

miracle.text: Becoming an instrument in the miracle created by the faith of thousands and lakhs of hearts became a golden page in the history of Adhyatma Parivar!

cta.heading: Dev Bagicha Decorated with Various Flowers
cta.content: We can assist you in creating a beautiful Dev Bagicha filled with diverse flowers for worship.

intro.p1: Due to migration, when Jains settle in a new place, a new Jinalaya becomes essential as a center of devotion. That is why when the King of Sihor settled in Bhavnagar, he invited Jain
intro.p2: and others to settle in the city. But they said,
intro.highlight2: "We will not come without a Jinalaya."
intro.p3: The king provided land for the Jinalaya. There are many such historical examples.
intro.p4: Therefore, Adhyatma Parivar has initiated a grand project called
intro.p5: To ensure that Jinalaya construction is scripturally correct and attractive, planning is done systematically. A glimpse is as follows:

planningSteps: Preparing plans according to Shilpa Shastra.
Designing attractive and spiritually uplifting sketches of pillars, niches, domes, etc.
Ensuring purity of stone and other materials.
Personally supervising every level including stone purchase, construction, fitting, carving, etc.
Carving life events of Tirthankars and impactful religious events so that the Jinalaya gains recognition as Jain architecture in the future.

process.title: Jinalaya Stone Construction Process (Work Started: V.S. 2076)
process.desc: Through Adhyatma Shilpshala, this work has been started to protect crores of Devdravyas, ensure strong structure, and achieve deep and attractive carving — a threefold benefit.

items.text: This is the Aras tunnel mine.
During purchase of a slab from Ambaji mine with the quarry owner and Adhyatma Parivar construction team.
Stone block prepared after slab purchase.
Not only from Ambaji or Makrana, but stone blocks have also been imported from Italy, Thassos (Greece), Ethiopia, Iran and other countries.

stoneBlock.title: Jaisalmer Stone Block
stoneBlock.subtext2: This stone block is cut to required dimensions using a tracing machine.

items.title: Pillars can be made in any shape.
Profiling can be done in any required shape.
Such inlay work is also done in the Shilpshala.
After machine work, manual fine carving becomes easier.

delwada.text: The temples of Delwada win our hearts even after 800 years because instead of sawdust, silver, gold, and gems were used to achieve deep carving. If carving is shallow, it gets erased within 25–50 years due to polishing.

currentProject.title: The Magnificent Jinalaya of Kutch-Rapar-Gadhwali
currentProject.text: The carving and profiling of the magnificent Jinalaya of Kutch-Rapar-Gadhwali is being done at Adhyatma Shilpshala.

gallery.text: The carving of Shri Shanti Kanak Jinalaya, Nanpura Surat, has become an attraction for many experts!
Shri Shantivardhak Jinalaya – Pal. Even under construction, it captivates the heart — imagine how it will look when fully completed!

jinalayaSuddhi.metaTitle: Jinalaya Purification - Upashray Purification | Jinmandir Department

intro.text: 'The Lord’s abode should appear like a divine aircraft.' With this sentiment, Adhyatma Parivar carries out this unique work. Every pillar, corner, spire, and intricate carving of the Jinalaya is purified, along with various worship accessories. Complete purification of Upashrays is also part of this project. The quality of work is visible in the before and after images.

shatrunjay.title: A Landmark of Fortune: On the Peak of Shatrunjay
shatrunjay.p1: Every year, purification of Dada Adinath’s sanctum and Rangmandap, along with nearby Jinalayas, Deris, and Navtunk Jinalayas, including painting work, is carried out.
shatrunjay.p2: Along with purification of all Navtunk spires, preservation process using German company water repellent is ongoing to prevent Nigod.

risk.title: Purification work is carried out even at risk to life.

cta.heading: Need Purification of Jinalaya / Upashray?
cta.content: If any Jinalaya or Upashray near you requires purification — inform us, we are ready to serve.

pattharGhadayi.metaTitle: Marble Stone Carving for Jinalaya and Home Jinalaya | Jinmandir Department

header.title: Marble Stone Carving for Jinalaya and Home Jinalaya
header.subtitle: Crafting required stones for Jinalaya and Home Jinalaya

intro.text: You have read and observed about stone carving for Jinalayas at Adhyatma Shilpshala. During this work, stones suitable for home Jinalayas are separately crafted. Beautiful Deris with heart-pleasing carvings are prepared according to the devotion of devotees wishing to build home Jinalayas.

showcase.title: Some beautiful Home Jinalayas constructed by Adhyatma Parivar.
